metadata.srm_warning: SRM detected in Phase 2. T/C ratio=1.0833. Results are analytical only — not decision-grade.

impact.risk_note: SRM was detected in this experiment. All impact figures carry high uncertainty until a clean re-run is completed.

recommendation.reasoning: A Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) was detected in Exp 1 (T/C ratio = 1.0833, chi2 = 447.13, p ≈ 0). This means the randomization was compromised — treatment and control groups are not comparable. Any observed lift cannot be attributed to the checkout redesign alone. The experiment MUST be restarted with a fixed randomization pipeline before any shipping decision can be made.
recommendation.what_would_change_rec: A clean re-run (no SRM, SRM chi2 p > 0.01) showing p < 0.05 and absolute lift ≥ 0.004 (10.53% relative) would change this recommendation to SHIP.
recommendation.pm_recommendation:
RECOMMENDATION: NO-SHIP — RESTART EXPERIMENT

⚠️  CRITICAL: A Sample Ratio Mismatch was detected, meaning the experiment's randomization was broken. The numbers below are reported for completeness but CANNOT be used as the basis for a shipping decision. The experiment must be restarted.

The checkout redesign experiment ran for 22 days on ShopSmart India's checkout funnel (40,000 daily visitors). The treatment group showed a conversion rate of 11.88% vs. 12.04% in control — a relative lift of -1.34% (95% CI: -0.0040 to +0.0008). At our assumed AOV of ₹1,200 and 50% traffic allocation, this translates to a projected annual revenue impact of ₹-1.42 Crore.

A Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM) was detected in Exp 1 (T/C ratio = 1.0833, chi2 = 447.13, p ≈ 0). This means the randomization was compromised — treatment and control groups are not comparable. Any observed lift cannot be attributed to the checkout redesign alone. The experiment MUST be restarted with a fixed randomization pipeline before any shipping decision can be made.

What would change this recommendation: A clean re-run (no SRM, SRM chi2 p > 0.01) showing p < 0.05 and absolute lift ≥ 0.004 (10.53% relative) would change this recommendation to SHIP.

phase6_save.note: Phase 6 power retrospective will compare these observed values to pre-registered values.
